raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent improved the conceptual clarity by softening unsupported superlatives and tightening wording, but did not introduce new framing or reframing.",
    "R1.4": "The agent addressed novelty more carefully by removing unverifiable claims and providing a more nuanced comparison to prior work, though it could have mapped against more specific works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged issues with citations and removed unsupported claims, but did not audit every load-bearing citation or provide precise bibliographic details for missing key works.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty in the superlative claims and suggested conditions under which they could be reinstated, showing a good balance of confidence and caution.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stayed within the scope of the original text, making only necessary changes to improve clarity and tone without introducing new content or drifting from the main points.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoided introducing new errors or harmful content and identified potential issues in the original claims, ensuring no regressions were introduced.",
    "RX.5": "The agent annotated major changes with reasons but did not provide annotations for every minor edit, maintaining a high level of traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent improved the conceptual clarity by softening unsupported superlatives and tightening wording, but did not introduce new framing or reframing.
rationale.R1.4: The agent addressed novelty more carefully by removing unverifiable claims and providing a more nuanced comparison to prior work, though it could have mapped against more specific works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged issues with citations and removed unsupported claims, but did not audit every load-bearing citation or provide precise bibliographic details for missing key works.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty in the superlative claims and suggested conditions under which they could be reinstated, showing a good balance of confidence and caution.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stayed within the scope of the original text, making only necessary changes to improve clarity and tone without introducing new content or drifting from the main points.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoided introducing new errors or harmful content and identified potential issues in the original claims, ensuring no regressions were introduced.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotated major changes with reasons but did not provide annotations for every minor edit, maintaining a high level of traceability.
